items.title: MrBeast Says First Person To Crack His Super Bowl Ad Puzzle Wins $1 Million: Here's What You Have To Do
items.description: MrBeast said viewers who solve hidden clues in his Super Bowl ad can win $1 million as Salesforce uses the YouTube star's first Big Game appearance to promote Slack's AI assistant, even as the company's shares show mixed market performance.

items.title: S&P 500 rises, led by tech; Dow climbs to fresh record: Live updates
items.description: The moves come after the major averages bounced back Friday from sizable losses suffered earlier in the week.

items.title: Salesforce Army Deal And AI Push Reframe Growth And Valuation Outlook
items.description: Salesforce (NYSE:CRM) has secured a 10 year, US$5.6b contract with the U.S. Army to support modernization and unification of military operations using its cloud and AI tools. The company is undergoing leadership changes, including departures at Tableau and Slack, as it adjusts to competitive pressure from fast moving AI platforms. Salesforce is also working with partners in the EMBERPOINT joint venture, aiming to apply AI and data capabilities to wildfire prevention and response. For...

items.title: 'This probably seems overdone': Wall Street strategists weigh in on software stock sell-off
items.description: Software stocks have led tech lower in recent weeks. Wall Street strategists say the move may be overdone.

items.title: The Software Stock Panic Will Be a Buying Opportunity—Eventually
items.description: The tech stock panic stems from a misunderstanding about AI models like Claude ChatGPT. It’s making for some very cheap stocks.
